notes:
### Bug Fixes

- Biome rule for tailwind (18cd2d1)

- Match font-size zoom by produced character, not physical key (0ae5455)

- Fail pending calls on every death path (92cc314)

- Deterministic open ordering + reset-on-respawn + non-exhaustive Subscriber (475a5f1)

- Omit absent Option fields on the wire (5f7c580)

- Distinguish "no writes yet" from "seq 0 processed" (e142bea)

- Plug 3 real bugs + 2 test-quality issues from copilot review (2ab9707)

- Drop secureTextEntry from the token field (928d734)

- Comprehensive error handling + console logging (eeef292)

- Redirect to Home once session is connected (45f26f6)

- Copilot review — ReactNode import, prefill useEffect, socket generation guard, tsconfig, helper rename (1317fb3)

- Expo/dom peer deps + onReady handshake for the terminal ref (429661a)

- Hide stack header + keyboard avoiding view over full-screen terminal (dd0dd65)

- Just KeyboardAvoidingView, drop insets + headerHeight (20bbbdb)

- Keyboard-aware layout with Animated.Value spacer (447da44)

- Register xterm listeners before initial fit() (7a85c42)

- TerminalDom onData ref pattern to survive parent state changes (532f150)

- ApplyCtrl only transforms letters, passes everything else through (e42f1c2)

- Pad keyboard spacer with safe-area bottom on Android (b234974)

- Bound boot() retry loop + safeCssColor for CSS interpolation (5cee3fd)

- Treat empty cwd/cmd strings as None when auto-spawning (3cd189f)

- Plug spawn-race + drop redundant subscribe gate + clean CwdTable annotation (a9aef2a)

- Is_spawned overlay guards on reader_alive, not just map presence (9e88fe7)

- Fall back to Move up/down menu items instead of drag-to-reorder (b6efc3a)

- Route entry through index.js so gesture-handler side-effects fire before expo-router (4bce0b7)

- Move GestureHandlerRootView from root layout into ProjectsScreen (9f4b104)

- CRUD senders wrap op_id + body under the outer content-body key (9490924)

- Compose <projectId>:<tabId> in TabSummary to match desktop's makeTabKey (58ae422)

- Four Copilot nits (reorder-oldIdx guard + fast-fail send + two comment updates) (be8b4e6)

- Key mobile-op inboxes by (connection_id, op_id) so multi-client pairing routes cleanly (a21cb40)

- Three follow-ups so the Biome + bun test jobs pass on the desktop side (84ef459)

- Recognize agents launched behind a wrapper (fb1c56e)


### CI

- Normalize spaces in updater bundle filenames (#69) (d4c35f9)

- Scope JS test job to src/ so sidecar tests don't run in CI (ec9698f)

- Install sidecar deps and run its test suite in CI (c75f9f1)

- Trigger on PRs targeting the sidecar-substrate epic branch (d09511c)

- Drift check for the wire-protocol bindings (b0871ce)

- Install companion deps before regen; swap git diff --exit-status → --quiet (2de39cf)

- Print the actual drift diff on protocol.gen.ts failure (b3ce46a)

- Enable cache-all-crates so Tauri's third-party build outputs are cached (f6042b8)

- Fix bundle paths for workspace target dir (bd635f4)


### Documentation

- Fork attribution, README fork notice, v0.1.6 (4c64956)

- Drop iOS-only modal dismissal detail from placeholder (2c9c926)

- Add signing + release guide (updater key, Apple creds, CI) (4bc7a12)


### Features

- Bootstrap Expo project (Phase 0) (445f8ca)

- Set up uniwind for className-based styling (3803505)

- Added tailwind directive support (c35cad8)

- Add Settings window with font family and size (55e82c6)

- Headless-xterm sidecar substrate (5228dba)

- StreamHub — per-tab fan-out + sequenced ring buffer (6f4763b)

- Wire-protocol frame catalog as Rust source of truth (dbd22d2)

- Wire regen-protocol to typeshare + biome + first codegen output (dcf07e3)

- Thread seq through write → serialize round-trip (5548a3b)

- Subscriber::Remote + subscribe_remote / resume_remote (9a7cef6)

- Dev-only bearer-token config with auto-init (84b2474)

- Read view + change-notification watch channel (9aa0a3a)

- Axum server + /stream route + auth handshake (adb094a)

- Frame dispatcher for every ClientFrame variant (6c033e3)

- Live projects push via registry watch channel (87c3a1c)

- Spawn WSS server on startup (69f9b86)

- Expo-router file-based routes for the four Phase-1 screens (90e3c94)

- Mirror desktop tailwind design tokens into global.css (fc7c0d2)

- Pairing config persistence (80067f7)

- $session nano-store with status + projects mirror (79cf2f4)

- WssClient module with reconnect + heartbeat + auth (bb26f62)

- Home paired/unpaired branch + Connect form (582b4bf)

- Auth-guard /projects and /tab/[tabid] with per-route Redirect (8f893f3)

- React-hook-form + zod form pattern, applied to Connect (662f4b4)

- Per-tab subscribe/write/resize API + resume on reconnect (e526bd8)

- TerminalDom (use dom) + TabScreen + tab.data (b148f0d)

- Minimum-viable /projects list to reach the terminal (0ecd28e)

- Extra-keys.helpers + tests, sequence maps + ctrl/alt appliers (8a222e5)

- ExtraKeysBar component, two rows of Termux-parity keys (3100cd9)

- Modifier state + sendInput funnel in useTabData (75e04ee)

- Render ExtraKeysBar + hide iOS keyboard accessory view (b5c38f1)

- Terminal-html.helpers, builder + tests for the raw-WebView HTML shell (f1f0a24)

- TerminalDom.android.tsx, xterm.js via unpkg inside react-native-webview (b039518)

- Extend TabSummary + ProjectSummary with the desktop $projects shape (f1aaa14)

- ProjectsCache replaces ProjectRegistry as the source of the Projects push (a2c8651)

- Wire ProjectsCache through server, pty lifecycle, and setup (a642278)

- Sync \$projects to WSS cache via new Tauri command (94f4506)

- Render sleeping tabs with a dimmed row + 'sleeping' pill (5f6ca83)

- Make spawn_pty's on_data Optional + add spawn_pty_if_absent helper (e3db14d)

- Auto-spawn PTY when mobile subscribes to a sleeping tab (dbbc9f4)

- 7 CRUD ClientFrame variants + OpError + body structs (e3737a1)

- ProjectsCache hydration flag + sync command carries it (ee672ef)

- Dispatch CRUD frames to React via wss:mobile_op Tauri event (e53e751)

- Install mobile-ops listener that maps CRUD ops to \$projects actions (4db795d)

- CRUD frame senders + op_id counter + pending map + OpError handling (c2ccd5d)

- Install gesture-handler + reanimated + action-sheet + draggable-flatlist (69e1a01)

- Editable ProjectsScreen with drag-to-reorder + long-press menus + sheets (02628d9)

- Bump gesture-handler to 3.0.2 + reanimated 4.5.1 + restore drag UI (39242cc)

- ServerFrame::OpOk so mobile senders resolve on success (edf30dd)


### Miscellaneous

- Exclude companion/ from desktop tooling (7269565)

- Add fmt/lint/typecheck/fallow check scripts (ed47b50)

- Install expo-router + peers, wire config (28003ca)

- Drop legacy App.tsx + index.ts entry (9f06e04)

- Install secure-store, async-storage, nanostores, @types/bun (a486ee6)

- Install xterm.js + addons + js-base64 (ac47fe2)

- Pin gesture-handler + reanimated + worklets to SDK 56 mandated versions (280ae0c)


### Refactor
